params.name: file_key
params.description: The key of the Figma file. This can be found in the URL of the file: figma.com/file/{file_key}/...

params.name: version
params.description: A specific version ID to get. Omitting this will get the current version.

params.name: ids
params.description: Comma-separated list of nodes that you want to receive. If not set, all nodes are returned.

params.name: depth
params.description: Positive integer representing how deep into the document tree to traverse. For example, setting depth=1 returns only pages.

params.name: geometry
params.description: Set to "paths" to export vector data.

params.name: plugin_data
params.description: Comma-separated list of plugin IDs or the string "shared" for data present in all plugins.

params.name: branch_data
params.description: Set to true to include branch metadata in the response.

items.docs: Returns the document tree for a given Figma file. If the file is large, the response may be paginated. The file_key can be found in the Figma file URL after figma.com/file/.

params.name: file_key
params.description: The key of the Figma file. This can be found in the URL of the file: figma.com/file/{file_key}/...

params.name: ids
params.description: Comma-separated list of node IDs to retrieve.

params.name: version
params.description: A specific version ID to get.

params.name: depth
params.description: Positive integer for how deep into the node tree to traverse.

params.name: geometry
params.description: Set to "paths" to export vector data.

params.name: plugin_data
params.description: Comma-separated list of plugin IDs or "shared".

items.docs: Returns the nodes referenced by ids as a JSON object. The nodes are retrieved from the document referred to by file_key. The node ID and file key for a given node can be parsed from any Figma node URL.

params.name: file_key
params.description: The key of the Figma file. This can be found in the URL of the file: figma.com/file/{file_key}/...

params.name: ids
params.description: Comma-separated list of node IDs to render.

params.name: scale
params.description: A number between 0.01 and 4, the image scaling factor.

params.name: format
params.description: Image output format.

params.name: svg_include_id
params.description: Whether to include id attributes for all SVG elements.

params.name: svg_simplify_stroke
params.description: Whether to simplify inside/outside strokes and use stroke attribute.

params.name: use_absolute_bounds
params.description: Use the full dimensions of the node regardless of cropping.

params.name: version
params.description: A specific version ID to get.

items.docs: Renders images from a file. If no error occurs, the response includes a mapping from node IDs to URLs of the rendered images. The image assets are stored temporarily and expire after 14 days.

params.name: file_key
params.description: The key of the Figma file. This can be found in the URL of the file: figma.com/file/{file_key}/...

items.docs: Returns a mapping of image references to URLs of the image contents. Image URLs expire after no more than 14 days.

params.name: file_key
params.description: The key of the Figma file. This can be found in the URL of the file: figma.com/file/{file_key}/...

params.name: page_size
params.description: Number of items to return per page. Defaults to 30.

params.name: before
params.description: Version ID before which to start listing versions. Used for pagination.

params.name: after
params.description: Version ID after which to start listing versions. Used for pagination.

items.docs: Returns a list of the version history of a file. The version history consists of versions, auto-save entries, and named versions.

params.name: file_key
params.description: The key of the Figma file. This can be found in the URL of the file: figma.com/file/{file_key}/...

params.name: as_md
params.description: If set to true, comment message content will be returned as Markdown instead of plain text.

items.docs: Gets a list of comments left on the file. Comments are returned in order of creation, with the most recent comments first. By default, only root-level comments and their direct replies are returned.

params.name: file_key
params.description: The key of the Figma file. This can be found in the URL of the file: figma.com/file/{file_key}/...

items.docs: Posts a new comment on the file. The body of the request should contain the comment text and optionally the position (client_meta) where the comment should be pinned.

params.name: file_key
params.description: The key of the Figma file. This can be found in the URL of the file: figma.com/file/{file_key}/...

params.name: comment_id
params.description: The ID of the comment to delete.

items.docs: Deletes a specific comment. Only the comment creator or file owner can delete a comment.

params.name: file_key
params.description: The key of the Figma file. This can be found in the URL of the file: figma.com/file/{file_key}/...

params.name: comment_id
params.description: The ID of the comment.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Cursor for paginated results.

items.docs: Gets a paginated list of reactions for a comment.

params.name: file_key
params.description: The key of the Figma file. This can be found in the URL of the file: figma.com/file/{file_key}/...

params.name: comment_id
params.description: The ID of the comment.

items.docs: Posts a reaction to a comment.

params.name: team_id
params.description: The ID of the team.

params.name: page_size
params.description: Number of items per page. Defaults to 30.

params.name: after
params.description: Cursor for paginated results. Use the cursor value from pagination in a previous response.

params.name: before
params.description: Cursor for paginated results in reverse.

items.docs: Get a paginated list of published components within a team library. The components are returned in order of when they were published.

params.name: file_key
params.description: The key of the Figma file. This can be found in the URL of the file: figma.com/file/{file_key}/...

items.docs: Get a list of published components within a file library.

params.name: key
params.description: The unique identifier of the component.

items.docs: Get metadata on a component by key. This is the unique identifier for a published component that is globally unique across all files.

params.name: team_id
params.description: The ID of the team.

params.name: page_size
params.description: Number of items per page.

params.name: after
params.description: Cursor for pagination.

params.name: before
params.description: Cursor for reverse pagination.

items.docs: Get a paginated list of published component sets within a team library.

params.name: team_id
params.description: The ID of the team.

params.name: page_size
params.description: Number of items per page.

params.name: after
params.description: Cursor for pagination.

params.name: before
params.description: Cursor for reverse pagination.

items.docs: Get a paginated list of published styles within a team library.

params.name: team_id
params.description: The ID of the team.

items.docs: Lists the projects for a specified team. Only projects visible to the authenticated user are returned.

params.name: project_id
params.description: The ID of the project to list files from.

params.name: branch_data
params.description: Set to true to include branch metadata.

items.docs: Lists the files in a given project.
Returns the user information for the currently authenticated user.
